_comment: Offerings + payment/booking links. Fill payment_url with Stripe Payment Links you create in the Stripe dashboard, and booking_url with your Calendly event link. Pages reference this data so prices/links live in ONE place. Collection only — disbursing the charitable fund is a human-authorized action.

giving.name: Charitable Gift Fund (passed to partner orgs)
giving.note: Collection only; disbursement to other orgs is authorized manually by a human.
